request: Our front desk staff spends hours every day answering the same appointment questions over email and phone. Patients also say reminder emails occasionally aren't sent. We'd like a better way to handle scheduling and communication.
We receive hundreds of PDFs from clients every week. Someone has to rename each file, move it into the correct folder, and tell the attorneys that new documents have arrived.
Housekeeping currently texts maintenance when they find something broken. Requests are frequently forgotten or duplicated, and managers don't know what's been completed.
